PathOfBuilding.Notes: Archetype stage: endgame Kinetic Fusillade Ballista Totem endgame setup using the current progression tree and safe ranged totem bossing package. Applied changes: - Set class=Scion ascendancy=Ascendant - Set level=92 - Renamed first tree to '^xE9B3FBLv 92 (Current)' - Selected primary skill group containing 'Kinetic Fusillade' - Set main skill to Kinetic Fusillade in group 1 - Set movement group 4 to: Shield Charge, Faster Attacks, Frostblink - Set config enemyLevel=84 - Set config conditionEnemyLightningExposure=True - Set config conditionEnemyShocked=True - Set config conditionShockEffect=10 - Set config usePowerCharges=True - Set config useFrenzyCharges=True - Set config conditionEnemyBlinded=True - Set config conditionEnemyBleeding=True
